name: High River Style

granted_abilities.name: Redirect Flames
granted_abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage, enemy models within (m)1" of this model gain a Burning token.

granted_actions.name: Flaming Dragon Kick
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: If a Chi token is used during this action, it has a raise value of 3.
granted_actions.effects: Target gains a Burning token. If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Self-Reflection
triggers.text: This model gains a Chi token.

extraction_notes: The limitation '-' indicates no specific restrictions beyond standard upgrade rules.
The action includes two distinct effects sections: one triggered by Chi token use (raise value 3) that affects the attack, and post-resolution effects for the target and the upgrade itself.
